combined_text: PUBG release date REVEALED: Desert map goes LIVE ahead of full release "PUBG release date REVEALED: Desert map goes LIVE ahead of full release BATTLEGROUNDS fans are in for an exciting few weeks, as the Desert map hits the test servers, while the full game gets a release date. By Liam Martin PUBLISHED: 12:59, Sat, Dec 9, 2017 | UPDATED: 12:59, Sat, Dec 9, 2017BLUEHOLEP
